howItWorks.title: Frictionless Hiring, Zero Risk
howItWorks.subtitle: We merge the speed of Web2 SaaS with the transparency and security of Web3 Smart Contracts.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Talent doesn't upload empty CVs. They pass AI tests and receive an immutable SBT (Soulbound Token) that certifies their real skills.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our algorithm analyzes the company's tech stack and talent SBTs to make the perfect match in under 48 hours. Zero human bias.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The company deposits funds in a Smart Contract. Talent works securely. Payment is released automatically upon delivery.

engine.title:
The Ultimate
Recruitment Engine
engine.desc: DAO Talent Hub deploys quantum models and predictive LLMs to audit not just GitHub, but contributions on Hugging Face, Kaggle, arXiv papers, and quantum computing architectures. We build an irrefutable on-chain profile of the top 1% elite global talent, eliminating hiring risk.

tokenomics.title: On-Chain Governance & Rewards
tokenomics.subtitle: Talent retains 100% of their value. Investors fund the engine. Everyone wins with $TAL.
tokenomics.card1Desc: Each successfully completed project adds on-chain experience, leveling up your SBT and unlocking premium clients.
tokenomics.card2Desc: Early adopters, validator nodes, and Top 1% talent receive periodic airdrops and voting power over DAO fees.
